title: Dragon Origin
description: This is my first mod made by me making a dragon origin for my friend, i hope anyone that downloads it enjoys.
body:
This is my first mod adding a Dragon origin into Minecraft 

I hope you enjoy and anyone else that find this enjoys

Also you need the :Origin mod(fabric), and Fabric API



The Dragon Origin lets you flap your wings and shoot fireball along with other stuff for balance please play to see all of the cool stuff i added
